description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a dark brown finish and a green grip section near the head for improved handling. The axe head is made of metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade that has a sharp, silver-colored cutting edge and a darker, matte upper section. The blade is single-edged and features a pronounced beard, extending the cutting edge downward for better control and leverage. The poll (rear) of the axe head is flat and squared, suitable for light hammering tasks. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the axe head using a traditional wedged mounting style. There are no visible brand markings or decorative engravings on the axe, giving it a utilitarian appearance suitable for urban maintenance or emergency use.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, single-edged metal blade featuring a green grip and a pronounced beard. The design is utilitarian, with no visible markings or decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden handle, green grip, and the full profile of the broad, single-edged metal blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow edge of the blade and the alignment of the handle with the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature, green grip, and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: End-on view showing the handle's cross-section and the attachment point to the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a green rubberized grip section, oval cross-section, ergonomic and grippy.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a pronounced beard and flat poll, matte finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle fitted through the axe head.
